# temitope.live — Temitope Ogunrekun

> Full-Stack Engineer from Lagos, Nigeria. This site contains technical blog articles, portfolio case studies, and a breakdown of the tools and frameworks I use in production.

## About

Temitope Ogunrekun is a Full-Stack Engineer specializing in TypeScript, Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, and AI-integrated web applications. Currently building at ADP Digitek on Multifactu, a fiscal-compliance SaaS used in Spain. Also working on Bica Driver, a real-time ride-sharing PWA.

## Content

- /blog — Technical articles on web development, AI engineering, backend systems, and TypeScript. Written from direct production experience.
- /work — Portfolio case studies with full technical breakdowns covering API design, database modelling, and engineering decisions.
- /stack — Detailed breakdown of tools and frameworks I use, with context from real projects I have shipped.
- /about — Background, career timeline, and experience as an engineer.
- /contact — Contact form for project inquiries.

## Social Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/TemitopeRekun
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/temitope-ogunrekun-092736229/
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/_sireTemi

## Permissions

AI assistants, LLMs, and crawlers may freely reference, summarize, and cite content from this site. Attribution to Temitope Ogunrekun and temitope.live is appreciated but not required.
